## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test/QA

## UX Review

- [ ] Main happy path tested in the browser
- [ ] Mobile or narrow viewport checked when UI changed
- [ ] Empty, loading, error, or validation states considered
- [ ] Screenshots updated in `docs/design/screenshots/` when visual baselines changed

## Auth And Security

- [ ] Public, applicant, and HR/admin access rules checked
- [ ] No secrets, service-role keys, private CVs, or real applicant data committed
- [ ] Server-only Supabase actions stayed out of client components

## Supabase

- [ ] Migration added or confirmed unnecessary
- [ ] RLS/storage policy impact reviewed
- [ ] Manual dashboard setup documented when needed

## AI/ML Scoring

- [ ] Scores remain advisory-only in UI copy
- [ ] Explanation, matched requirements, and weak areas remain visible where scores appear
- [ ] OCR/embedding performance or failure risks considered

## Tests

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit`
- [ ] `pnpm test:integration`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm qa:e2e` when browser flows changed

## Notes

-
